name: Carbamazepine may reduce methadone exposure
actions: Use caution when methadone is combined with carbamazepine.
Monitor for reduced methadone effect or opioid withdrawal (educational).

rationale: Carbamazepine can induce metabolic pathways involved in methadone clearance.
Combined use may reduce methadone exposure and precipitate withdrawal or reduced efficacy.

explanation_template: {B_name} may reduce methadone exposure when combined with {A_name}, which can reduce opioid effect or precipitate withdrawal.
